stem: A savings account was opened with an initial balance of $740. The value of the account tripled every 6 years. Which equation represents the value of the account B(t), in dollars, t years after the account was opened?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. Since the balance triples every 6 years, the number of 6-year periods after t years is t/6. The value can be found by multiplying the initial $740 by 3 raised to the number of 6-year periods, giving B(t) = 740(3)t/6.

Choice B corresponds to a balance that decreases to one-third its value every 6 years. Choices C and D use the wrong base and/or exponent and do not match the description.
